description: Independent naturalistic validation corpus. Cases authored with real narrative language, not copied from engine concept lexicon. Designed to measure real-world recall, not lexical matching.

calibration.description: Used to tune engine concept patterns. May be adjusted after first run.

validation.description: Fixed validation set. Results are reported. Must not be altered after first run.

holdout.description: Untouched holdout. Must NOT be run or altered until after pilot phase.

designRules: No phrases copied from engine regexes/concepts
No accident names or case IDs in narratives
Real natural language, varied syntax and vocabulary
Holdout not altered after seeing results
